bikes.description: Sun North Bay bicycle in Pearl Blue. Size Large. Step-thru hybrid. 21-speed Shimano drivetrain with front and rear linear pull hand brakes. At the time of the theft, it had a black metal detachable shopping basket installed on the front handlebars as well as a silver drink holder, both of which may have been removed. It had a black Orbit tracking device mounted to the main frame (top tube) which was either removed or disabled.
bikes.title: Sun North Bay

bikes.frame_model: moped-style, retro design with a short wheelbase and 20-inch fat tires, built from an aluminum alloy for a blend of lightness and strength, featuring a distinctive banana seat and integrated lights, making it both functional and stylish. It's essentially a classic, vintage scooter look adapted into a modern, powerful electric bicycle. Key Frame Characteristics: Design: Moped-style, retro, often compared to classic mopeds or mini-bikes. Material: Aluminum alloy, sometimes combined with steel for durability. Tires: 20-inch fat tires for stability on varied terrains. Seat: Texas-style banana seat with detailed stitching for comfort and style. Components: Includes front suspension, integrated LED lights, turn signals, and a unique overall look with tidy cable management. In essence, the frame model is a stylish, durable, retro-inspired design built for comfort and versatility, common to the OUXI V8 series.
bikes.title: 2024 OUXI moped-style, retro design with a shor...

bikes.description: Black Trek Marlin 29er hardtail with large white “TREK” logo. Alpha Gold Aluminum frame; Boost 141 rear hub; Bontrager XR3 Comp tires; hydraulic disc brakes; 1x drivetrain. Accessories: black bottle cage on seat tube, kickstand, reflectors. Stolen from LSU campus (Engineering Lane Bike Parking Hub between BEC and Patrick F. Taylor Hall) on Dec 11, 2025 between ~8:30–11:30 PM (CST). LSUPD Case 25-1212001. Contact: +1 (225) 501-0912, leonel.ferreira@lsu.edu.
bikes.title: 2023 Trek Marlin (Gen 3) 29er hardtail

bikes.description:
Red Canyon bike
Aero handlebar (Prime Doyenne)
Carbon Wheels (55mm Elite wheels)
On a day of theft the bike had a round bag on the handlebar? another bag was on the top tube, and the 3rd one was under the saddle. 
There was also a yellow plush Emoji toy (Smile) attached to the seatbag.
bikes.title: 2021 Canyon bicycles Endurace CF7

bikes.description:
Frame was bought new as a frameset in 1983. Distinctive Frame Features: Slightly sloping top tube to allow 19 inch seat tube (unusual for a bicycle of this era), Reynolds 531 frame and fork, Champaign Cycle shop sticker on downtube below front derailleur.
Braze-ons: Top tube braze ons for rear brake cable housing, Downtube water bottle braze-on, Derailleur cable guides above bottom bracket. Many components were of the early 1980s vintage.
bikes.title: 1983 Trek 700
